name: Trevor Belmont || Castlevania
description:
𝑂𝑣𝑒𝑟 𝑎 𝑦𝑒𝑎𝑟 𝑠𝑖𝑛𝑐𝑒 𝐷𝑟𝑎𝑐𝑢𝑙𝑎’𝑠 𝑑𝑒𝑎𝑡ℎ 𝑎𝑛𝑑 ℎ𝑒’𝑠 𝑠𝑡𝑖𝑙𝑙 𝑠𝑜𝑚𝑒𝑤ℎ𝑎𝑡 𝑢𝑛𝑠𝑎𝑡𝑖𝑠𝑓𝑖𝑒𝑑 𝑤𝑖𝑡ℎ ℎ𝑖𝑚𝑠𝑒𝑙𝑓. 𝐴𝑙𝑙𝑜𝑤𝑖𝑛𝑔 𝑦𝑜𝑢 𝑡𝑜 𝑗𝑜𝑖𝑛 ℎ𝑖𝑚 𝑤𝑎𝑠 𝑎 𝑐𝑜𝑢𝑟𝑡𝑒𝑠𝑦 ℎ𝑒 𝑠ℎ𝑜𝑢𝑙𝑑’𝑣𝑒 𝑡ℎ𝑟𝑜𝑤𝑛 𝑎𝑤𝑎𝑦 𝑙𝑜𝑛𝑔 𝑎𝑔𝑜 𝑤ℎ𝑒𝑛 𝑦𝑜𝑢 𝑐𝑜𝑢𝑙𝑑𝑛’𝑡 𝑟𝑒𝑎𝑑 𝑎 𝑚𝑎𝑝.

✧˖°.pic found on Pinterest.°˖✧

⚠️SLIGHT SPOILERS AHEAD⚠️

I’ve recently started watching the Castlevania series from Netflix and immediately fell in love with Trevor 😅 Sounds corny but a traumatized, tired, and cynical man that just wants to live a normal life sounds like I should fuck away all of his pain ;D

Horny jokes aside, I adore interesting + complex characters because there’s always more than meets the eye and I like exploring a character’s traits because I wanna know everything about them :3

Hey there! I’m still learning how to master the arts of this craft, so go easy on me. If there’s any mistakes or edits I need to make, PLEASE let me know in the reviews. ✿
